# Shark Branding Solutions
> AI visibility strategy, local search consulting, workshops, and growth planning for businesses across Tampa Bay, Wesley Chapel, and St. Petersburg, Florida.

## About
Shark Branding Solutions is a marketing and growth consultancy founded by Michelle Stanaland. The firm helps local businesses improve how they appear across Google, reviews, business listings, and AI-powered search experiences so buyers can find them, trust them, and choose them more easily.

## Founder
Michelle Stanaland is the Founder and CEO of Shark Branding Solutions. She was named one of the Top 15 Marketing Experts in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest in 2024 and 2025 and is a featured growth strategist connected to the North Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce.

## What We Help With
- AI visibility consulting
- Generative Engine Optimization for local businesses
- Local SEO and visibility audits
- Reputation and trust signal strategy
- Buyer intent and conversion strategy
- Executive workshops for business owners and leadership teams

## Core Pages
- / - Homepage for AI visibility, local search, trust, and growth strategy
- /about - Michelle Stanaland biography, credentials, and perspective
- /workshops - Executive workshop overview and FAQs
- /plans - Monthly growth plans and pricing
- /portfolio - Design and creative portfolio across print, digital, websites, social media, and campaign assets
- /contact - Contact and service area information
- /free-report - Free business visibility report request page
- /hvac-local-seo-case-study - Local Business Toolkit HVAC case study showing ranking gains for high-intent keywords in less than 30 days

## Service Pages
- /ai-visibility-consulting - AI visibility consulting for local businesses
- /geo-for-local-businesses - Generative Engine Optimization for local businesses
- /local-seo-visibility-audit - Local SEO and visibility audit page
